title: begonia boucheana
intro: Begonia boucheana, also known as Begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. It is primarily used as an ornamental plant due to its attractive foliage and vibrant flowers. The Begonia plant is also valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. Begonia boucheana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for its health benefits, which include reducing anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function.
